query:
UPDATE claims c
JOIN vehicle_market_valuations v ON v.claim_id = c.id
SET c.vehicle_market_value = v.final_adjusted_value
WHERE c.vehicle_market_value IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute UPDATE claims c
JOIN vehicle_market_valuations v ON v.claim_id = c.id
SET c.vehicle_market_value = v.final_adjusted_value
WHERE c.vehicle_market_value IS NULL;
